message:
feat(fp-columnar): add Column.astype parity (frankenpandas-0kb3)

Adds Column::astype(target) wrapping fp_types::cast_scalar per element,
so the Column-level cast inherits pandas-aligned coercion rules
(Int64↔Float64, Bool→Int64, Utf8 parsing, etc.) for free. Same-dtype
calls short-circuit to a clone; element-level cast failures surface
through ColumnError::Type carrying the underlying TypeError; missing
values pass through.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
